summary: Multi-Casernes Phase 6 comprehensive testing completed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - Casernes tab, toggle, CRUD modal, caserne filters in Planning (Toutes/C1/C2), mode_caserne selector in type de garde edit form.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing casernes (Caserne 1 - Centre with code C1, Caserne 2 - Est with code C2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Casernes module fully implemented and tested (Phase 6). Two casernes exist in demo tenant (C1, C2). Multi-casernes toggle is ACTIVE. Types de garde have mode_caserne field with 'global' as default. Planning page shows caserne filter pills (Toutes/C1/C2) when multi-casernes is active. The remplacements/search.py correctly filters candidates by caserne when mode_caserne='par_caserne'.

2_types_garde_mode_caserne_default.details: All types have mode_caserne field, default is 'global'

3_users_caserne_ids_default.details: Users have caserne_ids field (list, can be empty)

20_get_casernes.details: Returns list of casernes with id, nom, code, couleur, adresse, telephone

21_create_caserne.details: Creates caserne with all fields, persists to database

40_user_caserne_ids.details: caserne_ids can be updated on users

casernes_tab_visible.details: Casernes card visible in Paramètres grid with 'Multi-casernes' description

multi_casernes_toggle.details: Toggle section shows 'Mode Multi-Casernes' with Actif/Désactivé status

casernes_list.details: Shows 'Casernes (2)' with existing casernes when multi-casernes is active

caserne_modal.details: Modal has all fields: Nom, Code court, Couleur, Adresse, Téléphone with data-testid attributes

planning_caserne_filters.details: Filter pills visible: 'Toutes', 'C1', 'C2' in Planning page header

mode_caserne_selector.details: Mode caserne dropdown visible in type de garde edit modal with 'Global' and 'Par caserne' options

code_review_notes.casernes_py: Well-structured CRUD with proper validation (unique name, delete protection)
code_review_notes.planning_py: Assignation model includes caserne_id field for multi-casernes support
code_review_notes.search_py: Remplacements search correctly filters by caserne when mode_caserne='par_caserne'
code_review_notes.frontend_planning: filteredAssignations useMemo correctly filters by caserne_id for par_caserne types
code_review_notes.frontend_casernes_settings: All form fields have data-testid attributes for testing
